name: Kwik Kash Pawn of Gallatin
description_short: Kwik Kash Pawn Shop of Gallatin is a federally licensed pawnbroker in Gallatin, TN specializing in firearms and other collateral-based loans.
description_long:
Kwik Kash Pawn Shop of Gallatin operated as a licensed pawnbroker holding a Federal Firearms License (FFL) issued by the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives (ATF). The business was located at 207 N Water Ave in Gallatin, Tennessee 37066, serving the local community with collateral-based lending services. The company held FFL Type 02 designation, which classified it as a pawnbroker in firearms other than destructive devices, indicating they engaged in transactions involving firearms as collateral.

As a licensed pawnbroker, the business offered the standard pawn shop services including accepting items of value as collateral for short-term loans. Their FFL status allowed them to handle firearms transactions in compliance with federal regulations, making them a regulated financial service provider in their market.

The business maintained direct phone contact (615-989-1254) with customers and operated from their physical location on North Water Avenue in downtown Gallatin. The company's federal licensing demonstrates they operated under ATF oversight and regulatory compliance requirements, distinguishing them from unlicensed lending operations.

Importantly, this FFL license expired on February 1, 2020, and the business is no longer actively licensed. The FFLs.com database notes an updated version of this license exists, but current operational status cannot be verified from the available information. Prospective customers should verify current licensing and operational status before attempting to conduct business.
pros: Federally licensed and regulated by the ATF as a Type 02 pawnbroker, ensuring legal compliance and oversight
Specialized in firearms transactions with proper FFL licensure, meeting strict federal regulatory requirements
Established local business with documented business registration and physical storefront in Gallatin
Direct phone contact available (615-989-1254) for customer inquiries
Located in downtown Gallatin on North Water Avenue, accessible central location
cons: FFL license expired February 1, 2020 — business is not currently federally licensed
No current website or online presence beyond FFLs.com registry listing
Current operational status unknown; no verification of active business operations
Limited information available about specific loan terms, interest rates, or fees
No consumer reviews or ratings available to assess service quality
best_for: Customers seeking to verify historical FFL licensing information for research or regulatory purposes
Individuals in the Gallatin, TN area seeking pawn services (if business has renewed licensing since 2020)
Firearms dealers needing to verify FFL status for transfer purposes

This profile should be used only for historical reference or licensing verification purposes; individuals seeking pawn services in the Gallatin area should independently verify whether this business has renewed its license and remains operational before attempting to conduct transactions.
